text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While in town on the weekend, I spot Symboli
Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What about this store? No... I doubt it would suit
his taste.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's out shopping, but there are two
familiar figures shadowing her...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: W-w-waaaait... I-I feel dizzy!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Fine, get on my back and I'll carry you! We can't
let Prez out of our sights!

text_block_list.name: Fancy Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Then may I suggest a fountain pen? We have a
selection of designs from around the world.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... The Italian pen is splendid indeed.
However, I think I'll go with this German one.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The marriage of elegant design with practical form hasn't changed since the company's founding. Something like this is exactly what I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The recipient of this gift is someone I hold dear to
my heart. Would it be possible to add a message
card as well?

text_block_list.name: Teio & Tsurumaru
text_block_list.text: D-dear to her heart?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If it's not too much trouble, I'd like to substitute
this dish in the course meal for this antipasto.

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Employee
text_block_list.text:
Very well. We've also reserved a private dining
room for you, as requested.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. I'm sure the two of us will have a
relaxing evening, thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Teio & Tsurumaru
text_block_list.text: A private dining room... for two?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I've just arrived at our rendezvous. Hehe... I
can't wait to see you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She chose a present, reserved a private dining
room in a fancy restaurant... And by the sound of
that call, I bet she's on a—

text_block_list.name: Teio & Tsurumaru
text_block_list.text: Date!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now, now, you two. What are you saying?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: P-Prez?! Don't tell me you knew the whole time...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's rather hard to miss you when you're
being so obvious. You kept your distance, but I
noticed you from a long way off.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, what were we supposed to think?!

text_block_list.name: Teio & Tsurumaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, a change of plans?!
Wait, you're changing our plans?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I really do want to train with you both.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I realize how sudden this is... However, there's an
appointment I absolutely cannot miss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My apologies! I promise I'll make it up to you. I'll
get in touch with you later, so...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
President Rudolf... Prioritizing something over
training...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Must be someone really important to her. Who
could it be?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: With a mystery like that, of course we were gonna find out what's going on! So spill the beans—who're you meeting with?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Hm. Well, he's an integral part of my life—so
much so, that it would be difficult to find an
aspect of myself he hasn't influenced.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...H-he's that important? Could he be... I mean, I don't want to assume, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I speak of none other than my grandfather.

text_block_list.name: Teio & Tsurumaru
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
He lives in France, but he's returning to Japan for
a spell. I was running all those errands in
preparation for our reunion.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Wow, your grandfather... If he's anything like you,
I bet he's a wonderful person!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, he is! Perhaps it's due to his extensive travels,
but his every word and deed is filled with
elegance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was a little girl, I've looked up to him
as a figure I'd like to emulate.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's why you saw me running about town today.
I want to welcome him in a manner befitting the
regard I hold for him.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: You really admire him, huh...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: ...I think I get what you mean! So...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... We're gonna head back. It's not every day
you get to see your grandfather, so we'll get out
of your hair! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh! But if you want to mention that you have two clever juniors who look up to you, we won't stop you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thanks, you two. I'll make the most of this
day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why I keep running into these three
today, but I'm glad I got to glimpse this
heartwarming scene.
